overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character running through an ancient Egyptian palace interior with ornate fountains and classical statues, transitioning to a grand exterior colonnade with massive red marble columns during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with central marble fountain

events.description: character begins running past the central fountain basin
briefly passes behind a stone column near the fountain

agents.ego_description: running through the palace interior courtyard, navigating around the central fountain

notable_agents.action: kneeling and cleaning the area near the fountain basin

entered.detail: circular white marble fountain with water in the center of the courtyard
ornate geometric lattice windows allowing golden light to filter through
warm orange-red painted walls with decorative stone trim
large potted plants in terracotta containers

segments.scene_description: The character runs through an ornate interior courtyard featuring a central marble fountain where a servant kneels to clean. Warm golden light filters through geometric lattice windows onto terracotta walls and polished stone flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior passage with classical statue and offerings

events.description: moves from open courtyard into narrower corridor with lion skin rug
approaching the statue area with fire bowls creating warm flickering glow

agents.ego_description: running through the interior passage, passing a lion skin rug and approaching a large statue

entered.detail: large lion pelt spread on the marble floor
tall robed female figure holding a vessel, carved from white marble
stone bowls with flames on pillars flanking the statue
dark wooden decorative room dividers with geometric cutouts

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrower interior passage featuring a lion skin rug on the floor and approaches a large classical statue surrounded by fire offerings and scattered fruit offerings. Black lattice screens divide the space on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: long residential corridor with sleeping alcoves

events.description: passing a servant NPC kneeling in the corridor

agents.ego_description: running through the long corridor, passing sleeping alcoves and a cleaning servant

notable_agents.action: kneeling on the floor cleaning, then stands up as the player approaches

entered.detail: low couch with cushions behind a lattice screen divider
large terracotta storage vessels lined against the wall

segments.scene_description: Running through a long corridor lined with black lattice screens and sleeping alcoves, the character passes a servant kneeling on the marble floor. The space features decorative clay vases and low couches arranged behind the screens.

events.description: exits the palace interior into the bright outdoor colonnade
moving from shadow of the building into direct golden sunlight

agents.ego_description: running through the exterior colonnade, passing other pedestrians and enjoying the open air

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the colonnade pathway

entered.detail: massive cylindrical columns with red lower sections and white capitals
manicured greenery and trees visible beyond the colonnade
rocky desert mountains rising in the distance
exterior wall of the palace with decorative stone carvings

segments.scene_description: The character exits the palace into a grand exterior colonnade featuring massive red and white marble columns. The scene opens to reveal manicured gardens, distant desert mountains, and other pedestrians walking in the bright golden afternoon light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an opulent palace interior that shifts from an open, light-filled courtyard into a more intimate, ritualistic corridor. It begins by tracking a character running past a central marble fountain where a servant kneels, with warm golden light filtering through geometric lattice windows onto terracotta walls. As the character moves forward, the wide courtyard narrows into a passage where a lion skin rug stretches across the polished stone floor. The scene then shifts toward a large classical statue flanked by black lattice screens, moving closer to the flickering light of fire offerings and scattered fruit.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, shaded corridors of a palace interior into a vast, sun-drenched exterior colonnade. It begins by gliding through a long hallway lined with black lattice screens and sleeping alcoves, passing a kneeling servant and decorative clay vases on the marble floor. As the character moves forward, the enclosed space opens up, transitioning from the dim interior to the bright, golden light of the afternoon. The scene then expands into a grand outdoor gallery featuring massive red and white marble columns that frame a view of manicured gardens. Finally, the perspective widens to reveal pedestrians strolling through the plaza against a backdrop of distant desert mountains.
